propositions: A CI gate ensures every living top-level docs/*.md page is linked from the central index docs/README.md.
An allowlist exempts intentionally-unindexed files such as *.local.md and historical/archive docs.
The gate fails when a new living, non-allowlisted docs/*.md is not indexed.
The gate validates that relative markdown links within docs/ resolve, failing on any link to a nonexistent docs/ target.
The check is wired into both test.yml and gerrit-verify.yaml CI workflows.
The check follows the established gen_env_registry.py drift-gate pattern.
